  1. org.springframework.cloud.task.listener

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
Package
Description
org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener
Stream-based batch listener components for Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration
Interfaces for configuring Spring Cloud Task and a default implementations.
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
Stream-based task lifecycle listener support for Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation
Annotation-based listener support for Spring Cloud Task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener used by org.springframework.cloud.task.batch.listener
    Class
    Description
    TaskExecutionListener
    The listener interface for receiving task execution events.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener used by org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration
    Class
    Description
    TaskLifecycleListener
    Monitors the lifecycle of a task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener used by org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
    Class
    Description
    TaskException
    Base Exception for any Task issues.
    TaskExecutionListener
    The listener interface for receiving task execution events.
    TaskExecutionObservation
    Enumeration for task execution observations.
    TaskExecutionObservation.TaskKeyValues
     
    TaskExecutionObservationContext
    A mutable holder of the TaskExecution required by a ObservationHandler.
    TaskExecutionObservationConvention
    ObservationConvention for TaskExecutionObservationContext.
    TaskListenerExecutorObjectFactory
    Initializes TaskListenerExecutor for a task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener used by org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation
    Class
    Description
    TaskExecutionListener
    The listener interface for receiving task execution events.
